# Mian Muhammad Talha Suleman

> Pakistan-based entrepreneur and AI builder working across AI, e-commerce, manufacturing, electric vehicles, and emerging technology. Founder of a live e-commerce business and a portfolio of in-development AI and research ventures.

## About
